description: Adversarial invariant for AI/ML chronology cleanup: source-checked AI data, deep-learning, diffusion, and foundation-model workflow nodes should not fall back to generated placeholder dates.

checks.reason: Deep learning node is anchored to the 1986 backpropagation paper currently used as its primary source.
Diffusion-model generative AI node is anchored to the 2020 DDPM paper currently used as its primary source.
Deep-learning computer vision is currently anchored to the 2012 AlexNet/ImageNet source.
Generic computer vision should stay anchored to MIT's 1966 Summer Vision Project, not the 2012 deep-learning specialization.
Deep-learning computer vision should remain a specialization downstream of generic computer vision.
Deep-learning speech recognition is currently anchored to the 2012 deep-neural acoustic-modeling review.
AI training clusters are currently anchored to the 2015 FireCaffe compute-cluster training source.
Sequence-to-sequence attention is currently anchored to the 2014 neural machine translation attention paper.
Machine vision for robotics predates deep-learning vision and should route through generic computer vision.
Machine vision should retain the broader computer-vision dependency.
SLAM predates deep-learning vision and should route through generic computer vision when visual methods are modeled.
SLAM should retain a broad computer-vision dependency rather than an AlexNet-era dependency.
Autonomous-vehicle stacks should not require deep-learning computer vision as a historical prerequisite.
Autonomous-vehicle stack chronology should stay anchored to the DARPA Grand Challenge era rather than a generated 1983 placeholder.
Forecast autonomous-vehicle stack dependencies should keep the broad perception dependency speculative.
Drone aerial mapping should not depend on the road-vehicle autonomy stack.
Drone aerial mapping should route through broader mobile robot navigation capability.
Drone autonomy should not depend on the road-vehicle autonomy stack.
Drone autonomy should route through broader mobile robot navigation capability.
Data labeling platform coverage is currently sourced to ImageNet 2009 and should not use the generated 1983 placeholder.
ML benchmark dataset coverage is currently sourced to ImageNet 2009 and should not use the generated 1983 placeholder.
Self-supervised learning coverage is currently anchored to GPT-3 style large-scale self-supervised language modeling.
Model pretraining and fine-tuning workflow coverage is currently anchored to the 2021 foundation-model source.
